DataSource.SQL: SELECT itsKnbSetting.ID ,CONCAT(itsKbt.TextValue + ' - ' ,itsKnb.Title) AS Title ,FORMAT(itsKnb.CreateDate, 'dd.MM.yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS CreateDate ,creatorAcc.FullName AS AccountID ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.IconCssClass, 'ph-file') AS IconCssClass ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.ColorCssClass, 'primary') AS ColorCssClass FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.FolderTreeIdent = fot.Ident AND itsKnbSetting.[State] != @DeletedState INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS itsKnb ON itsKnb.Guid = itsKnbSetting.Guid AND itsKnb.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeSetting AS itsKbtSetting ON itsKbtSetting.Guid = itsKnbSetting.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS itsKbt ON itsKbt.Guid = itsKbtSetting.Guid AND itsKbt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS creatorAcc ON creatorAcc.ID = itsKnb.AccountID WHERE fot.Ident = @FolderTreeIdent ORDER BY itsKnb.CreateDate DESC

IF @ShowInLanguageID IS NOT NULL BEGIN SELECT lan.ID AS [Value] ,lan.[Name] AS Title ,IIF(lan.ID = @ShowInLanguageID, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM dbo.Language AS lan END ELSE BEGIN SELECT lan.ID AS [Value] ,lan.[Name] AS Title ,IIF(lan.ID = @UserLanguageID, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM dbo.Language AS lan END

SELECT itsKnb.Title ,itsKnb.Content ,itsLabAgg.TextValues AS ITSMLabelIDs ,itsKbt.TextValue AS ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid ,creatorAcc.[FullName] AS AccountID ,FORMAT(itsKnbSetting.[CreateDate], 'dd. MM. yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS CreateDate ,lastUpdateAcc.[FullName] AS LastUpdateAccountID ,FORMAT(itsKnbSetting.[LastUpdate], 'dd. MM. yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS UpdateDate FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS itsKnb ON itsKnb.Guid = itsKnbSetting.Guid AND itsKnb.LanguageID = ISNULL(@ShowInLanguageID, @UserLanguageID) INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS itsKbt ON itsKbt.Guid = itsKnbSetting.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid AND itsKbt.LanguageID = ISNULL(@ShowInLanguageID, @UserLanguageID) OUTER APPLY ( SELECT STRING_AGG(itsLab.TextValue, ', ') AS TextValues FROM dbo.MultiSelect AS mus INNER JOIN usr.ITSMLabel AS itsLab ON itsLab.ID = TRY_CAST(mus.[Value] AS INT) WHERE mus.TableID = itsKnbSetting.ID AND mus.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' AND mus.ControlIdent = 'ITSMLabelIDs' ) AS itsLabAgg LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS creatorAcc ON creatorAcc.ID = itsKnbSetting.AccountID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS lastUpdateAcc ON lastUpdateAcc.ID = itsKnbSetting.LastUpdateAccountID WHERE itsKnbSetting.[ID] = @ITSMKnowledgeBaseID

SELECT fil.ID ,fil.TableID ,fil.FormIdent ,fil.[Name] ,fil.[Extension] ,fil.[DataGuid] ,fil.[Size] ,CASE UPPER(fil.[Extension]) WHEN 'CSS' THEN 'ph-file-css' WHEN 'CSV' THEN 'ph-file-csv'
WHEN 'DOC' THEN 'ph-file-doc' WHEN 'DOCX' THEN 'ph-file-doc'
WHEN 'HTML' THEN 'ph-file-html'
WHEN 'APNG' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'PNG' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'AVIF' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'GIF' THEN 'ph-file-image' WHEN 'JPEG' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'JPG' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'JFIF' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'PJPEG' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'PJP' THEN 'ph-file-jpg' WHEN 'PNG' THEN 'ph-file-png' WHEN 'WEBP' THEN 'ph-file-image'
WHEN 'PDF' THEN 'ph-file-pdf'
WHEN 'PPT' THEN 'ph-file-ppt' WHEN 'RS' THEN 'ph-file-rs' WHEN 'TS' THEN 'ph-file-ts' WHEN 'TSX' THEN 'ph-file-tsx' WHEN 'VUE' THEN 'ph-file-vue'
WHEN 'XLS' THEN 'ph-file-xls' WHEN 'XLSX' THEN 'ph-file-xls'
WHEN 'ZIP' THEN 'ph-file-zip'
WHEN 'MP3' THEN 'ph-file-audio' WHEN 'OGG' THEN 'ph-file-audio' WHEN 'WAV' THEN 'ph-file-audio'
WHEN 'MP4' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'WEBM' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'AVI' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'FLV' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'MOV' THEN 'ph-file-video' WHEN 'WMV' THEN 'ph-file-video'
WHEN 'XML' THEN 'ph-file-text' WHEN 'MD' THEN 'ph-file-text' WHEN 'TXT' THEN 'ph-file-text' WHEN 'SQL' THEN 'ph-file-text'
ELSE 'ph-file' END AS [IconCssClass] ,CASE UPPER(fil.[Extension]) WHEN 'CSS' THEN '#214ce5' WHEN 'CSV' THEN '#088e32'
WHEN 'DOC' THEN '#325b9d' WHEN 'DOCX' THEN '#325b9d'
WHEN 'HTML' THEN '#e5532d'
WHEN 'APNG' THEN '#ff417b' WHEN 'PNG' THEN '#ff417b' WHEN 'AVIF' THEN '#bd2c61' WHEN 'GIF' THEN '#3e8bcb' WHEN 'JPEG' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'JPG' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'JFIF' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'PJPEG' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'PJP' THEN '#ee7e86' WHEN 'PNG' THEN '#ff417b' WHEN 'WEBP' THEN '#6cbc2b'
WHEN 'PDF' THEN '#b61308'
WHEN 'PPT' THEN '#d24a2b' WHEN 'RS' THEN '#080808' WHEN 'TS' THEN '#087670' WHEN 'TSX' THEN '#087670' WHEN 'VUE' THEN '#08bb7c'
WHEN 'XLS' THEN '#15763e' WHEN 'XLSX' THEN '#15763e'
WHEN 'ZIP' THEN '#febf08'
WHEN 'MP3' THEN '#6fb9ef' WHEN 'OGG' THEN '#1f7eb0' WHEN 'WAV' THEN '#c0257f'
WHEN 'MP4' THEN '#0a88c4' WHEN 'WEBM' THEN '#6dbc21' WHEN 'AVI' THEN '#3998d2' WHEN 'FLV' THEN '#af1209' WHEN 'MOV' THEN '#238dc2' WHEN 'WMV' THEN '#429ad0'
WHEN 'XML' THEN '#f4b400' WHEN 'MD' THEN '#f4b400' WHEN 'TXT' THEN '#f4b400' WHEN 'SQL' THEN '#f4b400'
ELSE '#000000' END AS [IconColor] ,CASE UPPER(fil.[Extension]) WHEN 'PNG' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'JPG' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'GIF' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'JPEG' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'BMP' THEN 'Image' WHEN 'PDF' THEN 'Pdf' WHEN 'XLS' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'XLSX' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'DOCX' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'DOC' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'PPT' THEN 'MSOffice' WHEN 'PPTX' THEN 'MSOffice' ELSE '' END AS FileType
/*FROM dbo.[File] AS fil*/ FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting INNER JOIN dbo.[File] AS fil ON fil.TableID = itsKnbSetting.ID AND fil.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' AND fil.ControlIdent = 'Attachments' AND fil.[State] = @FileActiveState INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseFileExtension AS itsKbfe ON itsKbfe.ID = fil.ID INNER JOIN dbo.MultiSelect AS mus ON mus.TableID = itsKbfe.ID AND mus.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseFileExtension' AND mus.ControlIdent = 'LanguageIDs' AND TRY_CAST(mus.[Value] AS INT) = ISNULL(@ShowInLanguageID, @UserLanguageID) WHERE itsKnbSetting.ID = @ITSMKnowledgeBaseID

Section.HTMLTemplate:
@{ var mainData = Model.Data.Main[0]; }

@mainData.Title

@foreach(var option in Model.Data.LanguageControlData) { @if(option.Selected == 1) {
} else {
} }
  • [#PublishedOn_ITSM#] @mainData.CreateDate
  • [#PublishedBy#] @mainData.AccountID
  • [#UpdatedOn_ITSM#] @mainData.UpdateDate
  • [#UpdatedBy_ITSM#] @mainData.LastUpdateAccountID
  • [#ITSMLabelIDs_ITSM#] @mainData.ITSMLabelIDs
@if (Model.Data.Attachments.Count > 0) {
@mainData.Content
@foreach (var attachment in Model.Data.Attachments) {
@attachment.Name
@attachment.Size MB
@if(attachment.FileType=="Image") { } else if(attachment.FileType=="Pdf"){ }
}
} else {
@mainData.Content
}
